description: Roadmaps for learning popular programming languages

steps: Learn the Basics: Basic Syntax, Variables and Data Types, Conditionals, Loops, Type Casting, Exceptions, Functions & Builtin Functions
Data Structures & Dictionaries: Lists, Tuples, Sets, Dictionaries
Advanced Basics & Functional Features: Modules (Builtin & Custom), Lambdas, Decorators, Iterators, Regular Expressions
Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA): Arrays and Linked Lists, Hash Tables, Heaps, Stacks and Queues, Binary Search Tree, Recursion, Sorting Algorithms
Package Managers & Configurations: PyPI, Pip, Conda, uv, Poetry, pyproject.toml, Configuration, Common Packages
Advanced Language Constructs: List Comprehensions, Generator Expressions, Paradigms, Context Managers
Object Oriented Programming (OOP): Classes, Inheritance, Methods, Dunder
Environments & Static Typing: Pipenv, virtualenv, pyenv, Environments, Static Typing (typing, mypy, pyright, pyre, Pydantic)
Code Formatting & Quality: yapf, black, ruff, Code Formatting
Concurrency & Runtime: Multiprocessing, Asynchrony, GIL, Threading
Learn a Framework (Web/Apps): Synchronous (Plotly Dash, Pyramid), Asynchronous (gevent, aiohttp, Tornado, Sanic), Mixed (FastAPI, Django, Flask)
Documentation: Sphinx, Documentation
Testing: tox, nose, unittest / pyUnit, doctest, pytest
Introduction to JavaScript (History, Versions, How to run)
All about Variables (var, let, const, Declarations, Hoisting, Naming Rules, Scopes)
Data Types (Primitive Types: string, number, boolean, undefined, bigint, null, Symbol)
Object (Built-in Objects, typeof operator, JSON)
Object Prototype & Prototypal Inheritance
Type Casting (Type Conversion vs Coercion, Implicit & Explicit Type Casting)
Data Structures (Indexed Collections: Arrays, Typed Arrays; Keyed Collections: Map, Weak Map, Set, Weak Set; Structured Data)
Equality Comparisons (Value Comparison Operators, Equality Algorithms)
Expressions & Operators (Conditional, Comma, Unary, Assignment, Comparison, Arithmetic, Bitwise, Logical, BigInt, String)
Loops and Iterations (for, while, do...while, break/continue, for...of, for...in)
Control Flow (Conditional Statements: if...else, Switch; Exceptional Handling: throw, try/catch/finally, Error Objects)
Functions (Parameters, Default Params, Rest, Arrow Functions, IIFEs, arguments object, Built-in Functions)
Scope & Function Stack (Recursion, Lexical Scoping, Closures)
DOM APIs
Strict Mode
Using (this) keyword (in a method, in a function, using it alone, in event handlers, in arrow functions)
Function Borrowing & Explicit Binding (call, apply, bind)
Asynchronous JavaScript (Event Loop, Callbacks, Callback Hell, Promises, async/await, setTimeout, setInterval)
Working with APIs (XMLHttpRequest, Fetch)
Modules in JavaScript (CommonJS, ESM)
Iterators and Generators
Classes
Memory Management (Memory Lifecycle, Garbage Collection)
Using Browser DevTools (Debugging Issues, Debugging Memory Leaks, Debugging Performance)
Learn the Basics (Basic Syntax, Lifecycle of a Program, Data Types, Variables and Scopes, Type Casting, Strings and Methods, Math Operations, Arrays, Conditionals, Loops, Basics of OOP)
Object Oriented Programming (Classes and Objects, Attributes and Methods, Access Specifiers, Static/Final Keywords, Nested Classes, Packages)

More about OOP (Object Lifecycle, Inheritance, Abstraction, Encapsulation, Interfaces, Method Chaining, Enums, Record, Method Overloading/Overriding, Initializer Block, Static vs Dynamic Binding, Pass by Value/Reference)
Exception Handling
Advanced Language Features (Lambda Expressions, Annotations, Modules, Optionals)
Core Utilities (Cryptography, Date and Time, Networking, Regular Expressions)
Concurrency (volatile keyword, Java Memory Model, Threads, Virtual Threads)
Collections Framework (Array vs ArrayList, Set, Map, Queue, Dequeue, Stack, Iterator, Generic Collections)
Dependency Injection
I/O and File Operations
Functional Programming (High Order Functions, Functional Interfaces, Functional Composition, Stream API)
Build Tools (Maven, Gradle, Bazel)
Web Frameworks (Spring Boot, Quarkus, Javalin, Play Framework)
Database Access (JDBC, EBean, Hibernate, Spring Data JPA)
Testing (Unit Testing: JUnit, TestNG; Integration Testing: REST Assured, JMeter; Behavior Testing: Cucumber-JVM; Mocking: Mockito)
Logging Frameworks (Logback, Log4j2, SLF4J, TinyLog)
Introduction to Language (What is C++, Why use C++, C vs C++)
Setting up your Environment (Installing C++, Code Editors / IDEs, Running your First Program)
Basic Operations (Arithmetic, Logical, and Bitwise Operators)
Control Flow & Statements (if else / switch / goto, loops)
Data Types (Static & Dynamic Typing, RTTI)
Functions (Function Overloading, Static Polymorphism, Lambdas, Operator Overloading)
Pointers and References (Memory Model, Lifetime of Objects, Raw Pointers, New/Delete, Smart Pointers)
Structuring Codebase (Forward Declarations, Headers/CPP Files, Namespaces, Scope)
Structures and Classes (Object Oriented Programming, Virtual Methods/Tables, Dynamic Polymorphism, Inheritance)
Exception Handling (Exit Codes, Exceptions, Access Violations)
Language Concepts (auto, Type Casting, Undefined Behavior, ADL, Name Mangling, Macros)
Templates (Variadic Templates, Template Specialization, SFINAE, Type Traits)
Standard Library + STL (iostream, Containers, Iterators, Algorithms, Date/Time, Multithreading)
Idioms (RAII, Pimpl, CRTP, Copy and Swap, Erase-Remove)
Language Tools (Compilers, Debuggers, Build Systems, Package Managers)
Working with Libraries & Frameworks
Introduction to Go
Language Basics
Variables & Constants
Data Types
Composite Types (Arrays, Slices, Strings, Maps)
Structs
Loops
Conditionals
Functions
Pointers
Methods and Interfaces
Generics
Code Organization (Modules & Dependencies, Packages)
Error Handling
Concurrency (Goroutines, Channels, Select)
Concurrency Patterns
Testing & Benchmarking
Standard Library (IO & File Handling, encoding/json)
Ecosystem & Popular Libraries
Building CLIs
Web Development (net/http, Frameworks, ORMs & DB Access)
gRPC & Protocol Buffers
Realtime Communication
Go Toolchain and Tools (Core Go Commands)
Code Quality and Analysis (Linters, Security)
Code Generation / Build Tags
Performance and Debugging (pprof, trace, Race Detector)
Deployment & Tooling (Building Executables, Cross-compilation)
Advanced Topics (Memory Mgmt. in Depth, Escape Analysis, Reflection, CGO)
